items.title: Anthropic acquires Humanloop
items.what: Anthropic announced the acquisition of Humanloop and emphasized stronger enterprise controls for prompt evaluation and LLM ops.
items.why: This strengthens Anthropic's enterprise workflow story beyond model quality and signals competition shifting to operational tooling.

items.title: The next chapter of Claude
items.what: Anthropic outlined the next phase of Claude, positioning product roadmap updates around broader deployment and developer use cases.
items.why: Roadmap-level announcements indicate product packaging and distribution are becoming as critical as benchmark performance.

items.title: February 27 release roundup
items.what: GitHub shared weekly updates including Copilot and project workflow changes in the official changelog roundup.
items.why: Frequent platform-level updates affect day-to-day developer productivity and agent-based coding workflow adoption.
